; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1
@.str.0 = private unnamed_addr constant [6 x i8] c"child\00", align 1
@.str.1 = private unnamed_addr constant [9 x i8] c"teenager\00", align 1
@.str.2 = private unnamed_addr constant [6 x i8] c"adult\00", align 1
@.str.3 = private unnamed_addr constant [7 x i8] c"senior\00", align 1
@.str.4 = private unnamed_addr constant [8 x i8] c"invalid\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @puts(ptr)

; --- definitions ---
; @InputKt_ageGroup
define ptr @InputKt_ageGroup(i32 %arg0) {
entry:
  %merge_2 = alloca ptr
  br label %bb1
bb1:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 0
  %t1 = add i32 0, 12
  %t2 = icmp sge i32 %arg0, %t0
  %t3 = icmp sle i32 %arg0, %t1
  %t4 = zext i1 %t2 to i32
  %t5 = zext i1 %t3 to i32
  %t6 = mul i32 %t4, %t5
  %t7 = trunc i32 %t6 to i1
  br i1 %t7, label %bb2, label %bb3
bb2:
  store ptr @.str.0, ptr %merge_2
  br label %bb10
bb3:
  %t8 = add i32 0, 13
  %t9 = add i32 0, 17
  %t10 = icmp sge i32 %arg0, %t8
  %t11 = icmp sle i32 %arg0, %t9
  %t12 = zext i1 %t10 to i32
  %t13 = zext i1 %t11 to i32
  %t14 = mul i32 %t12, %t13
  %t15 = trunc i32 %t14 to i1
  br i1 %t15, label %bb4, label %bb5
bb4:
  store ptr @.str.1, ptr %merge_2
  br label %bb10
bb5:
  %t16 = add i32 0, 18
  %t17 = add i32 0, 64
  %t18 = icmp sge i32 %arg0, %t16
  %t19 = icmp sle i32 %arg0, %t17
  %t20 = zext i1 %t18 to i32
  %t21 = zext i1 %t19 to i32
  %t22 = mul i32 %t20, %t21
  %t23 = trunc i32 %t22 to i1
  br i1 %t23, label %bb6, label %bb7
bb6:
  store ptr @.str.2, ptr %merge_2
  br label %bb10
bb7:
  %t24 = add i32 0, 65
  %t25 = add i32 0, 120
  %t26 = icmp sge i32 %arg0, %t24
  %t27 = icmp sle i32 %arg0, %t25
  %t28 = zext i1 %t26 to i32
  %t29 = zext i1 %t27 to i32
  %t30 = mul i32 %t28, %t29
  %t31 = trunc i32 %t30 to i1
  br i1 %t31, label %bb8, label %bb9
bb8:
  store ptr @.str.3, ptr %merge_2
  br label %bb10
bb9:
  store ptr @.str.4, ptr %merge_2
  br label %bb10
bb10:
  %t32 = load ptr, ptr %merge_2
  ret ptr %t32
}

; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 5
  %t1 = call ptr @InputKt_ageGroup(i32 %t0)
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t1)
  %t3 = add i32 0, 15
  %t4 = call ptr @InputKt_ageGroup(i32 %t3)
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t4)
  %t6 = add i32 0, 30
  %t7 = call ptr @InputKt_ageGroup(i32 %t6)
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t7)
  %t9 = add i32 0, 70
  %t10 = call ptr @InputKt_ageGroup(i32 %t9)
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t10)
  %t12 = add i32 0, -1
  %t13 = call ptr @InputKt_ageGroup(i32 %t12)
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t13)
  ret i32 0
}
